name: GovMap Israel National Geoportal
dataType: Topographic maps, cadastral boundaries, orthophotos, zoning, infrastructure
description: National geospatial portal managed by the Survey of Israel providing cadastral, topographic, planning, and infrastructure layers for the entire country.

name: Israel Meteorological Service Data Portal
dataType: Weather observations, climate normals, forecasts
description: Open meteorological database from IMS providing real-time and historical weather observations, climate atlas, and forecast data via API.

name: Geological Survey of Israel (GSI)
dataType: Geological maps, seismology, geochemistry, boreholes, bathymetry
description: National geological survey providing geological and structural maps, hazard maps, Dead Sea bathymetry, and earth science databases.

name: Saudi Geological Survey - National Geological Database
dataType: Geological maps, mineral exploration, geochemistry, remote sensing
description: National geological database portal rated 4.5/5 globally, providing geological maps, mineral resource data, and geoscience information for Saudi Arabia.

name: GASTAT Open Data Portal
dataType: Demographic, economic, social, and environmental statistics with geospatial visualization
description: Saudi Arabia's official statistics authority providing open data with interactive geospatial maps linking statistical data to geographic locations.

name: National Center for Meteorology - MeteoKSA
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climate data, numerical weather prediction
description: Saudi meteorological portal providing location-based weather alerts, 10-day forecasts, station data, and NWP outputs powered by high-performance supercomputing infrastructure.

name: Saudi Open Data Portal
dataType: Multi-sector datasets including health, economy, education, environment
description: Centralized Saudi open data platform hosting over 11,000 datasets across government entities with geospatial and statistical data layers.

name: UAE National Center of Meteorology (NCM)
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, satellite imagery, climate reports, seismology
cost: free (basic forecasts); data requests may involve fees
description: UAE national meteorological service providing weather forecasts, climate data, satellite imagery, and seismic monitoring under the Ministry of Climate Change and Environment.

name: Abu Dhabi Spatial Data Infrastructure (AD-SDI)
dataType: Land use, transportation, infrastructure, basemaps, utilities, environment
cost: free (government users); restricted for some layers
description: Abu Dhabi emirate-wide SDI providing 300+ infrastructure map layers accessed by 30+ public and private organizations for land use, utilities, and planning.

name: GeoDubai Geospatial Portal
dataType: Basemaps, building footprints, land parcels, urban planning, environmental data
cost: partially free (some data requires formal request)
description: Dubai Municipality's GIS platform providing access to geospatial data, technology, expert support, and training for government and private entities.

name: Bayanat - UAE National Open Data Portal
dataType: Economic, social, environmental, transport statistics with geo-data layers
description: UAE government official open data portal providing national statistics, geo-data layers, and multi-sector datasets for transparency and public use.

name: Qatar GIS Portal (CGIS)
operator: Center for GIS, Ministry of Municipality
dataType: Basemaps, cadastral boundaries, infrastructure, land use, planning
cost: free (public layers); restricted for sensitive data
description: Qatar's national GIS portal, one of the first fully integrated nationwide GIS systems globally, coordinating mapping across 16 government agencies.

name: Qatar Meteorology Department (QMD)
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climate archives, marine weather
cost: paid (data purchase required; terms and conditions apply)
description: Qatar's meteorological service collecting and archiving weather data since 1962, providing forecasts, marine weather, and climate monitoring; data available for purchase.

name: Kuwait Meteorological Center
operator: Directorate General of Civil Aviation - Meteorological Dept.
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, climate data
description: Kuwait's national meteorological center providing weather forecasts, current observations, and climate data through the Directorate General of Civil Aviation.

name: Kuwait Government Open Data Portal
dataType: Government datasets across multiple sectors
description: Kuwait's government open data portal providing public access to multi-sector government datasets as part of e-government transparency initiatives.

name: Oman National Survey and Geospatial Information Authority (NSGIA)
operator: National Survey and Geospatial Information Authority (NSGIA)
dataType: Topographic maps, geodetic data, aerial photography, satellite imagery, utilities
description: Oman's national geoportal managed by NSGIA under the Ministry of Defence providing geodetic networks, topographic maps, geoid data, and geospatial standards.

name: Bahrain Open Data Portal
dataType: Government datasets, geospatial data, demographic statistics
description: Bahrain's national open data portal facilitating access to government datasets, geospatial map layers, and statistical information for research and development.

name: Bahrain Spatial Data Infrastructure (BSDI)
dataType: Infrastructure maps, land parcels, utilities, basemaps
cost: free (public layers); restricted for detailed data
description: Bahrain Explorer GIS platform providing 300+ infrastructure map layers to 30+ organizations with advanced mapping and location services.

name: Royal Jordanian Geographic Centre (RJGC)
dataType: Topographic maps, aerial imagery, geodetic networks, cadastral data
description: Jordan's national mapping agency established in 1975, producing topographic maps, aerial surveys, and geodetic control networks covering all of Jordan in 184 sheets at 1:50000.

name: Jordan Meteorological Department (JMD)
dataType: Weather observations, climate records, forecasts, early warnings
cost: free for government/students; fees for commercial use
description: Jordan's meteorological service monitoring weather and climate since 1951, providing forecasts, early warnings, and archival climate data; free for government and academic users.

name: Jordan Open Government Data Portal
operator: Ministry of Digital Economy and Entrepreneurship
dataType: Multi-sector government datasets including geographic data
description: Jordan's open government data portal hosting thousands of datasets from various government entities for research, application development, and transparency.

name: Open Map Lebanon
operator: Open Map Lebanon (civil society / international donors)
dataType: Administrative boundaries, damage assessment, COVID-19 response, infrastructure
description: Civil-society-driven open data platform for Lebanon providing downloadable datasets including Beirut blast damage assessments, COVID-19 response data, and administrative boundaries.

name: UNEP Iraq Climate GIS Data Portal
dataType: Climate data, environmental indicators, land cover, water resources
description: UNEP Iraq climate GIS hub providing environmental and climate datasets with download capabilities in multiple formats and integrated GeoServices APIs.

name: Iraqi Meteorological Organization and Seismology
operator: Iraqi Meteorological Organization, Ministry of Transportation
dataType: Weather observations, forecasts, seismological data
description: Iraq's national meteorological and seismological service providing weather forecasts and station data; note that digital historical archives have limited coverage post-2015.

name: Iran National Cartographic Center - National Geoportal
dataType: Topographic maps, geodetic networks, aerial imagery, SDI layers
cost: partially free (registration required; some data restricted)
description: Iran's national spatial data infrastructure geoportal managed by NCC providing topographic, geodetic, and thematic map layers with provincial geoportal nodes.

name: Iran Meteorological Organization (IRIMO)
operator: Islamic Republic of Iran Meteorological Organization (IRIMO)
dataType: Weather observations, climate normals, synoptic data, forecasts
cost: free (basic; registered users with password access for climate archives)
description: Iran's national meteorological service operating across 28 provincial offices, providing weather forecasts, climate archives, and synoptic data; historical data available to registered users.

name: National Geoscience Database of Iran (NGDIR)
operator: Geological Survey and Mineral Exploration of Iran (GSI Iran)
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, geochemistry, geohazards, mining data
formats: Web viewer, PDF, data on request
description: Iran's centralized geoscience database established in 1999 for managing and sharing geological, geographical, mining, and hazard data from the Geological Survey of Iran.

name: Uzbekistan Open Data Portal
dataType: Government geo-data, cadastral boundaries, administrative datasets
description: Uzbekistan's national open data portal with dedicated geo-data section providing administrative, cadastral, and thematic spatial datasets from government agencies.

name: Uzbekistan National Geographic Information System (NGIS)
dataType: Geodetic networks, basemaps, cadastral data, satellite imagery
cost: free (basic layers); registration for full access
description: Uzbekistan's NGIS geoportal built with South Korean EXIM bank support, providing 115,000+ cadastral geodesy objects and basemap layers with GNSS infrastructure.

name: Kyrgyzstan Geoportal
operator: Geological Survey of Kyrgyzstan, Ministry of Natural Resources
dataType: Geological maps, mineral deposits, basemaps
description: Kyrgyzstan's national geoportal operated by the Geological Survey providing geological maps, mineral deposit data, and basemap layers.

name: Kyrgyz Data Cube
operator: Central Asian Institute of Applied Geosciences (CAIAG)
dataType: Satellite imagery time series, pasture monitoring, snow cover, drought indices
description: Open Data Cube implementation for Kyrgyzstan containing 18+ years of satellite data and derived products for pasture, snow, and drought monitoring.

name: Central Asia and Caucasus GeoPortal
operator: Geological Survey of Finland (GTK) and Central Asian partners
dataType: Geological maps, mineral resources, geochemistry, geohazards
description: Regional geoscience geoportal born from cooperation between GTK Finland and geological institutions in Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, and Uzbekistan.

name: Tajikistan Humanitarian Data Exchange
dataType: Administrative boundaries, populated places, roads, infrastructure
description: Primary open geospatial data source for Tajikistan through OCHA's Humanitarian Data Exchange, providing administrative boundaries, roads, and populated places.

name: Turkmenistan - World Bank Climate Knowledge Portal
dataType: Historical climate data, climate projections, temperature, precipitation
description: World Bank climate data portal for Turkmenistan providing historical climatology and future projections, serving as primary accessible climate data source for a country with very limited open data infrastructure.

name: Afghanistan Humanitarian Spatial Data Center (HSDC)
dataType: Disaster risk, demographics, accessibility, infrastructure, health services
formats: Web viewer, Shapefile, GeoJSON, PDF maps
description: iMMAP's humanitarian spatial data center for Afghanistan with 2500+ maps and WebGIS functionality covering flood risk, earthquakes, landslides, demographics, and essential services.

name: Afghanistan Spatial Database - World Bank
operator: World Bank - Poverty and Equity Global Practice
dataType: Poverty indicators, socioeconomic data, biophysical data, geospatial survey data
description: World Bank spatial database combining geo-enabled survey data with geospatial indicators for poverty mapping and development analysis across Afghanistan.

name: ACSAD - Arab Center for Studies of Arid Zones and Dry Lands
operator: Arab Center for Studies of Arid Zones and Dry Lands (League of Arab States)
dataType: Water resources, soil data, land degradation, desertification, crop genetics
formats: Reports, maps, database access on request
description: Pan-Arab research organization under the League of Arab States providing databases on water resources, soils, plant genetics, and livestock for arid zone development since 1968.

name: ICARDA GeoAgro - Geoinformatics for Dry Areas
operator: International Center for Agricultural Research in the Dry Areas (ICARDA/CGIAR)
dataType: Agroclimatic zones, land use, crop suitability, climate data, socioeconomic indicators
description: ICARDA's geoinformatics platform providing 200+ indicators on agroclimatic, biophysical, and socioeconomic data for dry areas spanning the Middle East, Central Asia, and North Africa.
